'''âng-s-b''' ('''kangasab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hence|hence]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hence|hence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-s-b
|-
! Lemma
| kangasab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingasab|thingasab]] || [[word:jingasab|jingasab]] || [[word:shingasab|shingasab]] || [[word:kingasab|kingasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungasab|thuthungasab]] || [[word:jujungasab|jujungasab]] || [[word:shushungasab|shushungasab]] || [[word:kukungasab|kukungasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungasab|thungasab]] || [[word:jungasab|jungasab]] || [[word:shungasab|shungasab]] || [[word:kungasab|kungasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungasab|thungasab]] || [[word:jungasab|jungasab]] || [[word:shungasab|shungasab]] || [[word:kungasab|kungasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengasab|thengasab]] || [[word:jengasab|jengasab]] || [[word:shengasab|shengasab]] || [[word:kengasab|kengasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongasab|thothongasab]] || [[word:jojongasab|jojongasab]] || [[word:shoshongasab|shoshongasab]] || [[word:kokongasab|kokongasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongasab|thongasab]] || [[word:jongasab|jongasab]] || [[word:shongasab|shongasab]] || [[word:kongasab|kongasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongasab|thongasab]] || [[word:jongasab|jongasab]] || [[word:shongasab|shongasab]] || [[word:kongasab|kongasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngasab|thĂŠngasab]] || [[word:jĂŠngasab|jĂŠngasab]] || [[word:shĂŠngasab|shĂŠngasab]] || [[word:kĂŠngasab|kĂŠngasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangasab|thathangasab]] || [[word:jajangasab|jajangasab]] || [[word:shashangasab|shashangasab]] || [[word:kakangasab|kakangasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangasab|thangasab]] || [[word:jangasab|jangasab]] || [[word:shangasab|shangasab]] || [[word:kangasab|kangasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangasab|thangasab]] || [[word:jangasab|jangasab]] || [[word:shangasab|shangasab]] || [[word:kangasab|kangasab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangasab|shangasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangasab|goshangasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangasab|gokishangasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangasabnĂŒ|shangasabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangasabnknĂŒ|goshangasabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasabnĂŒ|gokishangasabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangasabshĂ«|shangasabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangasabnkshĂ«|goshangasabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangasabshĂ«|gokishangasabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasabro|shangasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasabnkro|goshangasabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasabro|gokishangasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasabmu|shangasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasabnkmu|goshangasabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasabmu|gokishangasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangasabsher|shangasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangasabnksher|goshangasabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangasabsher|gokishangasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangasabng|shangasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangasabnkng|goshangasabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangasabng|gokishangasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangasabya|shangasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangasabnkya|goshangasabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangasabya|gokishangasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangasabyam|shangasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangasabnkyam|goshangasabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangasabyam|gokishangasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasabnĂŒshĂ«|shangasabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangasabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangasabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasabnĂŒro|shangasabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasabnknĂŒro|goshangasabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasabnĂŒro|gokishangasabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasabnĂŒmu|shangasabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasabnknĂŒmu|goshangasabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasabnĂŒmu|gokishangasabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasabshĂ«nĂŒ|shangasabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangasabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangasabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasabshĂ«ro|shangasabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasabnkshĂ«ro|goshangasabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasabshĂ«ro|gokishangasabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasabshĂ«mu|shangasabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasabnkshĂ«mu|goshangasabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasabshĂ«mu|gokishangasabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasabronĂŒ|shangasabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasabnkronĂŒ|goshangasabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasabronĂŒ|gokishangasabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasabroshĂ«|shangasabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasabnkroshĂ«|goshangasabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasabroshĂ«|gokishangasabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasabromu|shangasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasabnkromu|goshangasabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasabromu|gokishangasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasabmunĂŒ|shangasabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasabnkmunĂŒ|goshangasabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasabmunĂŒ|gokishangasabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasabmushĂ«|shangasabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasabnkmushĂ«|goshangasabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasabmushĂ«|gokishangasabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasabmuro|shangasabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasabnkmuro|goshangasabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasabmuro|gokishangasabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
